+# Correction Packet
+
+DISPATCH_ID: ISSUE-353
+AUTHOR: Planner / OpenAI Codex
+TIMESTAMP: 2026-06-09_01-25-53+0300
+RELATED_FILES:
+- crates/editor-egui-host/src/lib.rs
+- crates/editor-egui-host/src/palette_recent.rs
+STATUS: CORRECTION_OPEN
+
+## References
+
+- Task Packet: `ai_handoffs/ISSUE-353_TASK_2026-06-09_00-53-07+0300.md`
+- Latest Execution Report: `ai_handoffs/ISSUE-353_EXEC_2026-06-09_01-22-00+0300.md`
+- Latest Review Report: not issued for this correction round; this correction is based on the Human Arbiter's post-execution verification failure.
+- Prior Correction Packets: none; this is the first correction packet for `ISSUE-353`.
+
+## Approved Corrections (Planner Sign-Off)
+
+The Executor MUST act on exactly these corrections - nothing more, nothing less.
+
+1. **Restore split-lint compliance** - Post-execution canonical verification failed in the architecture lint gate:
+   `[split-exemption] FAIL` reported `crates\editor-egui-host\src\lib.rs:1001: file is 1008 lines (>1000) without // SPLIT-EXEMPTION: annotation`.
+   Required change: within the original `ISSUE-353` MAY-edit source surface, reduce `crates/editor-egui-host/src/lib.rs` to 1000 lines or fewer by moving the new command-palette recent persistence helper/wiring out of `lib.rs` into the already-added `crates/editor-egui-host/src/palette_recent.rs`, or by otherwise removing only incidental lines introduced by this dispatch. Do not add a `// SPLIT-EXEMPTION:` annotation for this correction; the file is only eight lines over the threshold and this dispatch already introduced a dedicated helper module.
+   Acceptance: `cargo run -q -p rge-tool-architecture-lints -- all` exits 0, and the `[split-exemption]` check no longer reports `crates/editor-egui-host/src/lib.rs`.
+
+## Deferred Findings (NOT Approved for This Round)
+
+None. The supplied verification log contains one failing gate, and this packet approves only the correction needed for that gate.
+
+## Updated Acceptance Criteria
+
+Unchanged from the Task Packet. This correction adds one correction-round gate: the canonical dispatch verification must exit 0 after the split-lint fix.
+
+## Re-Verification Gates
+
+The Executor MUST re-run these gates after the correction:
+
+- `cargo +nightly fmt --all -- --check` -> expected exit 0.
+- `cargo run -q -p rge-tool-architecture-lints -- all` -> expected exit 0, including `[split-exemption] PASS`.
+- `cargo test -p rge-editor-egui-host --lib command_palette_recent` -> expected exit 0.
+- `cargo test -p rge-editor-egui-host --lib` -> expected exit 0.
+- `.ai/dispatch.verify.ps1` -> expected exit 0 for the canonical CI checks: format, architecture lints, supply chain, workspace tests, and doctests.
+
+## Halt Conditions (Updated if Any)
+
+Unchanged from the Task Packet, plus halt and return to Planner if passing the architecture lint appears to require editing a forbidden path, changing Cargo metadata, changing architecture-lint configuration, adding a dependency, broadening command-palette behavior, or adding a split-exemption annotation instead of reducing `lib.rs` below the lint threshold.
+
+## Planner Notes
+
+This is not a request for functional redesign. Preserve the current command-palette recent persistence behavior and tests from the execution report; only adjust the placement or incidental size of the new host wiring so the existing architecture lint accepts the dispatch.
+
+---
+
+HANDOFF_STATUS: COMPLETE
+DISPATCH_ID: ISSUE-353
+AUTHOR: Planner / OpenAI Codex
+NEXT_ROLE: EXECUTOR_AI
+EXIT_CODE: 0
+
+---

@@ -0,0 +1,92 @@
+# Execution Report
+
+DISPATCH_ID: ISSUE-353
+AUTHOR: Executor / Codex
+TIMESTAMP: 2026-06-09_01-22-00+0300
+RELATED_FILES:
+- crates/editor-egui-host/src/lib.rs - loads persisted palette recents during host construction and saves after palette activation.
+- crates/editor-egui-host/src/palette_recent.rs - new dependency-free newline persistence helper for diagnostic id strings.
+- crates/editor-egui-host/src/menu_tests.rs - added focused command-palette recent persistence and non-recording tests.
+STATUS: AWAITING_REVIEW
+
+## Task Packet Reference
+
+`ai_handoffs/ISSUE-353_TASK_2026-06-09_00-53-07+0300.md`
+
+## Pre-Execution Review Consumed
+
+No pre-execution review issued for this dispatch.
+
+## Current-State Claims: Falsification Re-run
+
+- Claim: The host source had no command-palette recent persistence/config file I/O before this dispatch; recents were host-local state and helper calls only.
+  Re-run before edits: `git grep -n -e command_palette_recent_command_ids -e record_command_palette_recent_command -e palette_recent -- crates/editor-egui-host/src/lib.rs crates/editor-egui-host/src/menu.rs crates/editor-egui-host/src/menu_tests.rs` matched only the existing `lib.rs` recent field/init/render borrow/record call, `menu.rs` record helper, and `menu_tests.rs` tests.
+  Re-run before edits: `git grep -n -e "std::fs" -e "File::" -e "OpenOptions" -e "read_to_string" -e "create_dir_all" -- crates/editor-egui-host/src/lib.rs crates/editor-egui-host/src/menu.rs crates/editor-egui-host/src/menu_tests.rs` produced no matches.
+  Final direct search: `Select-String -Path crates/editor-egui-host/src/palette_recent.rs -Pattern 'std::fs','File::','OpenOptions','read_to_string','create_dir_all'` shows the new intended file I/O only in `palette_recent.rs` at `read_to_string`, `create_dir_all`, and `write`.
+- Claim: The production render path recorded palette recents only in the command-palette activation branch, then pushed that command through the existing menu-command handoff.
+  Re-run: `git grep -n -e "record_command_palette_recent_command" -e "menu_commands.push" -- crates/editor-egui-host/src/lib.rs crates/editor-egui-host/src/menu.rs crates/editor-egui-host/src/menu_tests.rs` now shows `record_command_palette_recent_command` only in the palette activation helper at `lib.rs:194`, `menu_commands.push(command)` in that same helper at `lib.rs:204`, and main-menu push sites at `lib.rs:862`, `872`, `882`, `892`, and `903` with no recent-recording call.
+- Claim: Existing task-100 tests pinned capped/deduped in-memory recents, blank-filter promotion, stale/disabled recent handling, and non-blank fuzzy ordering.
+  Re-run: `git grep -n -e "command_palette_recent_records_most_recent_ids_with_cap_and_deduplication" -e "command_palette_recent_blank_filter_promotes_enabled_recent_entries" -e "command_palette_recent_blank_filter_ignores_stale_ids_and_disabled_promotions" -e "command_palette_recent_non_blank_filter_preserves_fuzzy_score_ordering" -- crates/editor-egui-host/src/menu_tests.rs` found all four tests at `menu_tests.rs:588`, `796`, `816`, and `837`.
+- Claim: There was no tracked `palette_recent.rs` module file in the scoped host source tree.
+  Re-run: `git ls-files crates/editor-egui-host/src` still lists only the previously tracked `handoff.rs`, `lib.rs`, `menu.rs`, `menu_tests.rs`, and `tabs.rs`; the new `palette_recent.rs` remains an untracked dispatch addition until commit time.
+
+## What I Changed
+
+### Source
+
+- `crates/editor-egui-host/src/palette_recent.rs`: Added a host-local persistence helper that stores only newline-delimited `Command::diagnostic_id()` strings, validates one-line ids, caps/deduplicates most-recent-first ids, creates parent directories on save, and provides a nonfatal load-or-empty wrapper.
+- `crates/editor-egui-host/src/lib.rs`: Added the `palette_recent` module, a `command_palette_recent_path` field, constructor loading from the deterministic default config path, and a private palette activation helper that records, attempts to save, logs save failures at debug level, and enqueues through `MenuCommandHandoff`.
+- `crates/editor-egui-host/src/lib.rs`: Kept main-menu activation branches unchanged as direct `menu_commands.push(cmd.clone())` calls; only the command-palette activation branch calls the recent-record/save helper.
+
+### Tests
+
+- `crates/editor-egui-host/src/menu_tests.rs::command_palette_recent_persistence_round_trips_ids_only`: Verifies the persisted file contains only diagnostic id lines and loads back in order.
+- `crates/editor-egui-host/src/menu_tests.rs::command_palette_recent_persistence_caps_and_deduplicates_ids`: Verifies persistence normalization preserves first-seen most-recent order, removes duplicates, and enforces the existing cap.
+- `crates/editor-egui-host/src/menu_tests.rs::command_palette_recent_missing_unreadable_or_corrupt_persistence_is_nonfatal`: Verifies missing, directory/unreadable, and corrupt recent files fall back to an empty list at the host boundary.
+- `crates/editor-egui-host/src/menu_tests.rs::command_palette_recent_persisted_stale_and_disabled_ids_are_not_promoted`: Verifies loaded stale ids are ignored and disabled persisted ids remain in the original-order remainder.
+- `crates/editor-egui-host/src/menu_tests.rs::command_palette_recent_palette_activation_records_saves_and_enqueues`: Verifies successful palette activation records, saves, and still enqueues through `MenuCommandHandoff`.
+- `crates/editor-egui-host/src/menu_tests.rs::command_palette_recent_unwritable_save_does_not_block_palette_dispatch`: Verifies save failure at an unwritable path is nonfatal for in-memory recents and command dispatch.
+- `crates/editor-egui-host/src/menu_tests.rs::command_palette_recent_main_menu_activation_does_not_record_or_persist`: Verifies a main-menu style handoff push does not mutate or persist command-palette recents.
+
+### Docs
+
+- None. Status/planning docs were not needed for this scoped implementation.
+
+## Per-File Summary
+
+The source change is limited to host-local persistence and render-path wiring. The command-palette model remains the existing projected menu entry list, and command execution remains the existing `MenuCommandHandoff` path.
+
+## Verification Results
+
+- `cargo +nightly fmt --all -- --check` -> exit 0.
+- `cargo test -p rge-editor-egui-host --lib command_palette_recent` -> first attempt exited 1 before compilation because Cargo could not open `A:\RustCache\target\debug\.cargo-lock` (`Access is denied`). Rerun with `CARGO_TARGET_DIR=A:\RCAD\dispatch-worktrees\ISSUE-353\target-issue-353` -> exit 0; 11 passed, 0 failed, 0 ignored.
+- `cargo test -p rge-editor-egui-host --lib` with `CARGO_TARGET_DIR=A:\RCAD\dispatch-worktrees\ISSUE-353\target-issue-353` -> exit 0; 61 passed, 0 failed, 0 ignored.
+- `cargo check -p rge-editor-egui-host --lib` with `CARGO_TARGET_DIR=A:\RCAD\dispatch-worktrees\ISSUE-353\target-issue-353` -> exit 0.
+- `git diff --check` -> exit 0.
+- Cleanup: `cargo clean --target-dir target-issue-353` -> exit 0; removed the repo-local verification target directory after the gates.
+
+## Deviations from Task Packet
+
+None - execution stayed strictly within the Task Packet scope. The only verification adjustment was using a repo-local `CARGO_TARGET_DIR` because the default shared target cache was not writable in this session.
+
+## Open Questions for Reviewer
+
+- Please rerun the Cargo gates with your normal target cache if needed; this session required a repo-local target directory because `A:\RustCache` denied access before compilation.
+- Review whether the private default path `%APPDATA%\rge\command_palette_recent.txt` on Windows, `$XDG_CONFIG_HOME/rge/command_palette_recent.txt` on non-Windows, or fallback `.rge_config/command_palette_recent.txt` is the desired long-term host-local config path.
+
+## Worktree State
+
+- Tracked files: modified `crates/editor-egui-host/src/lib.rs`, `crates/editor-egui-host/src/menu_tests.rs`.
+- Untracked items: `crates/editor-egui-host/src/palette_recent.rs`, `ai_handoffs/ISSUE-353_TASK_2026-06-09_00-53-07+0300.md`, `ai_handoffs/ISSUE-353_TASK_2026-06-09_00-53-07+0300.meta.json`, `ai_handoffs/claims/ISSUE-353_2026-06-09_00-53-04-4234974+0300_claim.json`, this EXEC packet, and its sidecar after finalization.
+- Branch: `ai-dispatch/ISSUE-353`.
+- Last commit: `09c5425` ai-dispatch ISSUE-351: Audit next editor-usability task after extension seam (#352)
+
+---
+
+HANDOFF_STATUS: COMPLETE
+DISPATCH_ID: ISSUE-353
+AUTHOR: Executor / Codex
+NEXT_ROLE: REVIEWER_AI
+EXIT_CODE: 0
+
+---

@@ -0,0 +1,207 @@
+# Task Packet
+
+DISPATCH_ID: ISSUE-353
+AUTHOR: Planner / OpenAI Codex
+TIMESTAMP: 2026-06-09_00-53-07+0300
+RELATED_FILES:
+- crates/editor-egui-host/src/lib.rs
+- crates/editor-egui-host/src/menu.rs
+- crates/editor-egui-host/src/menu_tests.rs
+- crates/editor-egui-host/src/palette_recent.rs
+- HANDOFF.md
+- Status.md
+- change.md
+- ai_handoffs/ISSUE-353_EXEC_*.md
+- ai_handoffs/ISSUE-353_EXEC_*.meta.json
+STATUS: OPEN
+
+## Goal
+
+Persist the existing `editor-egui-host` command-palette recent activation ids across host sessions while preserving the current command-palette model and execution path. The work should load recents when the host is constructed, save after successful command-palette activations, and keep the task-100 ordering semantics for blank and non-blank filters.
+
+## Scope
+
+### MAY edit
+- `crates/editor-egui-host/src/lib.rs`
+- `crates/editor-egui-host/src/menu.rs`
+- `crates/editor-egui-host/src/menu_tests.rs`
+- `HANDOFF.md`
+- `Status.md`
+- `change.md`
+
+### MUST NOT edit
+- `Cargo.toml`
+- `Cargo.lock`
+- `**/Cargo.toml`
+- `crates/editor-shell/**`
+- `crates/editor-ui/**`
+- `crates/editor-actions/**`
+- `crates/editor-state/**`
+- `kernel/**`
+- `runtime/**`
+- `crates/runtime-wasmtime/**`
+- `crates/runtime-wasmtime-engine/**`
+- `plugins/**`
+- `crates/plugin-discovery/**`
+- `.github/workflows/**`
+- `.ai/*.schema.json`
+- `.ai/dispatch.verify.ps1`
+- `.ai/dispatch.tasks.md`
+- `Invoke-AiDispatchAuto.ps1`
+- `Invoke-AiDispatchGuard.ps1`
+- `Invoke-AiDispatchLoop.ps1`
+- `Invoke-AiDispatchQueue.ps1`
+- `Register-AiDispatchSchedule.ps1`
+- `Get-AiDispatchHealth.ps1`
+- `Get-AiDispatchTrends.ps1`
+- `Watch-AiDispatch.ps1`
+- `Watch-DispatchStages.ps1`
+- `Wait-GitHubActions.ps1`
+- `new-handoff.ps1`
+- `docs/**`
+- `plans/**`
+- `tasks/**`
+- `tools/**`
+- any existing `ai_handoffs/*` packet, including this TASK packet after finalization
+- any `ai_dispatch_logs/**` file
+
+### MAY add new files
+- `crates/editor-egui-host/src/palette_recent.rs`
+- `ai_handoffs/ISSUE-353_EXEC_*.md`
+- `ai_handoffs/ISSUE-353_EXEC_*.meta.json`
+
+### MUST NOT add new files
+- Any file outside the paths/globs listed under `### MAY add new files`.
+- New Cargo manifests, lockfiles, workflow files, schema files, architecture-lint files, dispatch automation files, ADRs, planning docs, runtime/kernel/plugin files, or alternate command-model files.
+
+### Advisory machine-readable scope envelope
+
+<!-- handoff:envelope v1 -->
+MAY_EDIT:
+  - crates/editor-egui-host/src/lib.rs
+  - crates/editor-egui-host/src/menu.rs
+  - crates/editor-egui-host/src/menu_tests.rs
+  - HANDOFF.md
+  - Status.md
+  - change.md
+  - crates/editor-egui-host/src/palette_recent.rs
+  - ai_handoffs/ISSUE-353_EXEC_*.md
+  - ai_handoffs/ISSUE-353_EXEC_*.meta.json
+MUST_NOT_EDIT:
+  - Cargo.toml
+  - Cargo.lock
+  - **/Cargo.toml
+  - crates/editor-shell/**
+  - crates/editor-ui/**
+  - crates/editor-actions/**
+  - crates/editor-state/**
+  - kernel/**
+  - runtime/**
+  - crates/runtime-wasmtime/**
+  - crates/runtime-wasmtime-engine/**
+  - plugins/**
+  - crates/plugin-discovery/**
+  - .github/workflows/**
+  - .ai/*.schema.json
+  - .ai/dispatch.verify.ps1
+  - .ai/dispatch.tasks.md
+  - Invoke-AiDispatchAuto.ps1
+  - Invoke-AiDispatchGuard.ps1
+  - Invoke-AiDispatchLoop.ps1
+  - Invoke-AiDispatchQueue.ps1
+  - Register-AiDispatchSchedule.ps1
+  - Get-AiDispatchHealth.ps1
+  - Get-AiDispatchTrends.ps1
+  - Watch-AiDispatch.ps1
+  - Watch-DispatchStages.ps1
+  - Wait-GitHubActions.ps1
+  - new-handoff.ps1
+  - docs/**
+  - plans/**
+  - tasks/**
+  - tools/**
+  - ai_handoffs/*_TASK_*.md
+  - ai_handoffs/*_REVIEW_*.md
+  - ai_handoffs/*_CORRECT_*.md
+  - ai_handoffs/*_CLOSEOUT_*.md
+  - ai_dispatch_logs/**
+INCIDENTAL_OK: false
+<!-- /handoff:envelope -->
+
+## Deliverables
+
+- A host-local persistence helper, either inside `menu.rs` or in optional `palette_recent.rs`, that stores only command diagnostic id strings and enforces the existing recent-list cap and most-recent-first deduplication.
+- `EguiHost` construction loads persisted command-palette recents from a deterministic config path, with an injectable path or equivalent test seam for unit tests.
+- Successful command-palette activations update the in-memory recent list and attempt to save it; persistence write failures are logged or ignored without blocking command dispatch.
+- Main-menu activations continue to enqueue commands through the existing `MenuCommandHandoff` path and do not update or persist command-palette recents.
+- Focused `rge-editor-egui-host` unit tests cover load/save, cap/dedup, stale persisted ids, disabled persisted ids, non-fatal missing/corrupt/unwritable persistence, main-menu non-recording, and unchanged non-blank fuzzy ordering.
+- Planning/status docs are updated only if useful to record the dispatch outcome; no architecture, doctrine, Cargo, schema, workflow, runtime, kernel, plugin, or editor-shell/ui/actions/state documentation is required.
+
+## Acceptance Criteria
+
+- Persisted data is just the existing `Command::diagnostic_id()` values used by the command palette; no favorites feature, second command model, alternate action registry, or new command execution path is introduced.
+- Blank command-palette filters promote only currently enabled persisted recent ids, ignore stale ids, and leave disabled matching ids in their normal original-order remainder position rather than promoting them.
+- Non-blank command-palette filters preserve the existing fuzzy ranking order regardless of persisted recents.
+- Missing, unreadable, corrupt, or unwritable recent-persistence files are non-fatal: the host still constructs or dispatches the selected command, and tests pin this behavior.
+- Saving happens only after a successful command-palette activation that returns an enabled command; opening, closing, filtering, selection movement, disabled rows, and main-menu clicks do not record recents.
+- The implementation stays within the allowed `editor-egui-host` source/test surface plus optional planning/status docs, and `Cargo.toml`, `Cargo.lock`, every `**/Cargo.toml`, schemas, workflows, dispatch automation, architecture-lint config, kernel, runtime, plugins, and `editor-shell`/`editor-ui`/`editor-actions`/`editor-state` files remain untouched.
+
+## Current-State Claims: Falsification Required
+
+Every negative or "unchanged" assertion this packet makes about current source must list its inverse-search command and result. The executor must re-run or update these checks if the working tree has changed before implementation.
+
+- Claim: The current host source has no command-palette recent persistence/config file I/O; recents are host-local state and helper calls only.
+  Falsifying search: `git grep -n -e command_palette_recent_command_ids -e record_command_palette_recent_command -e palette_recent -- crates/editor-egui-host/src/lib.rs crates/editor-egui-host/src/menu.rs crates/editor-egui-host/src/menu_tests.rs` -> matches only the import/field/`Vec::new()` initialization/render borrow and record call in `lib.rs`, the helper definition in `menu.rs`, and focused tests in `menu_tests.rs`.
+  Falsifying search: `git grep -n -e "std::fs" -e "File::" -e "OpenOptions" -e "read_to_string" -e "create_dir_all" -- crates/editor-egui-host/src/lib.rs crates/editor-egui-host/src/menu.rs crates/editor-egui-host/src/menu_tests.rs` -> exit 1 / no matches at planning time.
+- Claim: The current production render path records palette recents only in the command-palette activation branch, then pushes that command through the existing menu-command handoff.
+  Falsifying search: `git grep -n -e "record_command_palette_recent_command" -e "menu_commands.push" -- crates/editor-egui-host/src/lib.rs crates/editor-egui-host/src/menu.rs crates/editor-egui-host/src/menu_tests.rs` -> production `record_command_palette_recent_command` call appears at `crates/editor-egui-host/src/lib.rs:896`; main-menu push sites appear at `lib.rs:827`, `lib.rs:837`, `lib.rs:847`, `lib.rs:857`, and `lib.rs:868`; the command-palette push appears at `lib.rs:900`; no main-menu push site calls the recent-recording helper.
+- Claim: The current task-100 tests already pin capped/deduped in-memory recents, blank-filter promotion, stale/disabled recent handling, and non-blank fuzzy ordering.
+  Falsifying search: `git grep -n -e "command_palette_recent_records_most_recent_ids_with_cap_and_deduplication" -e "command_palette_recent_blank_filter_promotes_enabled_recent_entries" -e "command_palette_recent_blank_filter_ignores_stale_ids_and_disabled_promotions" -e "command_palette_recent_non_blank_filter_preserves_fuzzy_score_ordering" -- crates/editor-egui-host/src/menu_tests.rs` -> one match for each named test at `menu_tests.rs:569`, `menu_tests.rs:602`, `menu_tests.rs:622`, and `menu_tests.rs:643`.
+- Claim: There is no tracked `palette_recent.rs` module file in the scoped host source tree.
+  Falsifying search: `git ls-files crates/editor-egui-host/src` -> lists `handoff.rs`, `lib.rs`, `menu.rs`, `menu_tests.rs`, and `tabs.rs`; no `palette_recent.rs` at planning time.
+
+## Constraints / Non-Goals
+
+- Do not add favorites, pinned commands, user-visible palette management UI, or a second command data model.
+- Do not change command execution semantics: both main-menu and command-palette activations must still enqueue the existing `Command` through `MenuCommandHandoff`.
+- Do not move command definitions, menu definitions, shortcut resolution, or enablement logic out of the existing `editor-ui`/host projection relationship.
+- Do not add dependencies or touch Cargo metadata.
+- Do not make persistence I/O fatal for host construction, rendering, or command dispatch.
+- Do not record recents from main-menu activations, accelerator handling, or any editor-shell route.
+- Do not edit forbidden crates, runtime/kernel/plugin surfaces, workflows, schemas, dispatch automation, architecture-lint config, or unrelated docs.
+
+## Verification Gates
+
+The Executor MUST run and document the result of each of these in their `EXECUTION_REPORT`:
+
+- `cargo +nightly fmt --all -- --check` -> expected exit 0.
+- `cargo test -p rge-editor-egui-host --lib command_palette_recent` -> expected exit 0, covering the focused recent-persistence tests.
+- `cargo test -p rge-editor-egui-host --lib` -> expected exit 0 for the full host library unit-test suite.
+- `cargo check -p rge-editor-egui-host --lib` -> expected exit 0 for the full host library check.
+- `git diff --check` -> expected exit 0.
+
+## Halt Conditions
+
+The Executor MUST halt without committing and request fresh Planner guidance if any of the following occur:
+
+- The implementation appears to require editing any Cargo manifest or lockfile, adding a dependency, or changing workspace metadata.
+- The implementation appears to require edits outside the allowed files, including `editor-shell`, `editor-ui`, `editor-actions`, `editor-state`, kernel, runtime, plugin, workflow, schema, dispatch automation, architecture-lint, or unrelated documentation surfaces.
